center.name: Mount Isarog
center.summary: Mount Isarog是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Scale-feathered malkoha、Philippine green pigeon、Rough-crested malkoha等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in two protected areas in Quezon Protected Landscape and Mount Isarog National Park; however, like most areas in the Philippines protection is lax

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Banahaw, Mount Makiling, Mount Isarog, Bataan National Park and Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation and hunting continues despite this protection on paper

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, the population is believed to be declining due to deforestation from land conversion, Illegal logging and slash-and-burn farming. It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Banahaw, Mount Makiling, Mount Isarog, Bataan National Park and Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation and hunting continues despite this protection on paper
